title: tectaria novoguineensis
intro: Tectaria novoguineensis, also known as the New Guinea shield fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of the Asia-Pacific area. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tectaria novoguineensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
